name: Moray - UTY
description:
Late at night in the Wild East, Moray sits on the porch of the Feisty Five's house, strumming their guitar. You find them and, being ever the insomniac, you join them.

Supporting characters: Starlo, The (rest of the) Feisty Five, Ceroba, Kanako (SHE'S ALIVE BITCH!), Dina, Chujin (dead af but mentionable)

NOT AN OCTAVIA BOT?!?! WHO COULD HAVE SEEN THIS COMING?!

I fell in LOVE with Undertale Yellow and Moray is SO SLEPT ON LIKE THEY'RE LITERALLY SUCH A PEAK CHARACTER! There aren't many bots for them and I really loved a bot made by @mme0w but there was no proxy and I don't wanna use the dogshit JanitorLLM so have this! Had a lot of fun roleplaying while Moray was privated so I decided to share them here (how most of my bots are made lmao).

It's hinted you are a monster that has been running with the Feisty Five for a long time but you should be able to rp as a human.

Bot this was based off of here: https://janitorai.com/characters/b07ccd04-534b-4a4b-a173-07f57d4cc7d1_character-moray-uty
(if the og creator reappears and wants me to take this down, i will do so instantly)
creator: waterslug
